grounding: Fisher score criterion from Di Francescomarino et al. (2025), Step 7.3 of the DvM pipeline (Gu et al. 2011 generalized Fisher score), applied directly to M_all without classifier training. Threshold: fixed chi-squared critical value τ_F* = χ²_{1−α_F}(df=1).

description.criterion: F(c) = (conf₁−conf₀)² / (conf₁(1−conf₁)/napp₁ + conf₀(1−conf₀)/napp₀). Accept c if F(c) >= τ_F* = 3.841459. No statistical test. No FDR correction.
description.threshold_rule: Fixed chi-squared critical value: τ_F* = χ²_{1−0.05}(df=1) = 3.841459. Under H0: conf0=conf1, F(c) ~ chi2(1). Pr[F(c) >= τ_F*] = 0.05 per constraint. R_obs^FST = 66 is freely data-determined (NOT forced to match K_P1_REJECTIONS).
description.why_fdr_fails: Under σ∅ = σ_trace ∘ σ_label, F_null(c) ~ chi2(1)/n_app (approx). E[V_b] ≈ 0.05 × 437 = 21.9 false positives per rep. No Adaptive Storey π̂₀ correction and no empirical doubly-null calibration: FDR_emp = E[V_b]/R_obs is uncontrolled.
description.gap_interpretation: R_obs^FST = 66  vs  R_obs^P1 = 248. Gap = 182: P1's structural axis and adaptive Storey correction recover 182 constraints beyond FST's chi-squared threshold.
